Explicit Interface Implementations

ComputeItemStatisticsIfMissing

Indicates whether statistics of selected mosaic dataset items are computed if missing. If set to FALSE, items without statistics are skipped and excluded from the aggregate.

virtual bool ComputeItemStatisticsIfMissing { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDatasetReadOnly

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is in read-only mode. Mosaic dataset operations do not perform write operations on a read-only mosaic.

virtual bool IsDatasetReadOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MergeExistingStatistics

Indicates whether existing mosaic dataset statistics are used towards computation of the aggregate statistics.

virtual bool MergeExistingStatistics { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

All parameters associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Progressor

The external progressor object associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IProgressor Progressor { get; set; }

Returns

IProgressor

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryFilter

The query filter applied on the selection set to identify the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation. If no selection is specified, the query filter is applied on the entire catalog.

virtual IQueryFilter QueryFilter { get; set; }

Returns

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

Results

The properties of the result associated with the mosaic dataset operation.

virtual IPropertySet Results { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionSet

The selection set that identifies the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation.

virtual ISelectionSet SelectionSet { get; set; }

Returns

ISelectionSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateMosaicDataset

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is updated with the aggregate statistics.

virtual bool UpdateMosaicDataset { get; set; }

Returns

bool
